title: User logs in and reaches the dashboard
description: This verifies that a valid user can sign in and land on the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify dashboard summary content is visible

title: Log in and load the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a valid user can sign in and reach the dashboard with the expected summary content.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Rep completes a sales invoice and updates stock and customer balance
description: This verifies that completing a sales invoice deducts stock and updates the customer balance.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add a product to the invoice
Enter a valid quantity for the product
Verify stock is deducted and the customer balance is updated

title: Create a sales invoice with multiple items and print it
description: This test verifies that a user can complete a sales invoice with multiple items, update downstream stock and customer balance, and open the printable invoice view.
category: Sales invoice completion with stock deduction and customer balance update

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Navigate to the sales invoices page
Add multiple items to the invoice
Open the print view for the completed invoice
Verify the printable invoice view is displayed

title: Dashboard shows key operational and financial summaries
description: This verifies that the dashboard presents the main KPI and alert sections a user relies on for daily monitoring.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify sales KPI content is visible
Verify alert and summary content is visible

title: Record a customer collection
description: This test verifies that a user can post a customer payment linked to an invoice and see treasury and customer balances updated.
category: Treasury payment posting (customer collections, supplier payments, expenses)

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Navigate to the customer payments page
Link the payment to a customer invoice
Verify the customer payment is recorded
Verify treasury and customer balances are updated

title: Record a customer collection and reduce the customer balance
description: This verifies that a user can create a customer payment linked to an invoice and see the customer balance decrease afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open customer payments
Fill in the amount field with a valid payment amount
Verify the customer balance is reduced

title: Record a supplier payment
description: This test verifies that a user can post a supplier payment linked to an invoice and see treasury and supplier balances updated.
category: Treasury payment posting (customer collections, supplier payments, expenses)

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Navigate to the supplier payments page
Link the payment to a supplier invoice
Verify the supplier payment is recorded
Verify treasury and supplier balances are updated

title: Record a supplier payment and reduce the supplier balance
description: This verifies that a user can create a supplier payment linked to an invoice and see the supplier balance decrease afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open supplier payments
Fill in the amount field with a valid payment amount
Verify the supplier balance is reduced

title: Create a new user with role and permissions
description: Verifies that an admin can create a user, assign role and permissions, and save the new account successfully.

steps.description: Assign a role to the new user
Assign permissions to the new user
Verify the new user appears in the users list
Verify the assigned role and permissions are reflected for the new user

title: Dashboard highlights products needing replenishment
description: This verifies that inventory-related alerts are visible from the dashboard for low-stock follow-up.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify products needing replenishment are displayed

title: Record an expense
description: This test verifies that a user can record an expense and see the treasury movement reflected in balances and movements.
category: Treasury payment posting (customer collections, supplier payments, expenses)

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Navigate to the treasury expenses page
Verify the treasury balance is updated

title: Create a purchase invoice with multiple items
description: Verifies that a user can start a purchase invoice, add multiple products, enter quantities and prices, and save the invoice successfully.

steps.description: Add a product to the invoice
Add another product to the invoice
Fill in valid quantities and prices for the listed products
Verify the purchase invoice is created
Verify the invoice shows multiple line items

title: Block access to hidden cost information
description: This test verifies that a user without the required permission cannot view product cost data in the product list.
category: Permission enforcement for role-based module/cost visibility

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Create an expense and reduce treasury balance
description: This verifies that a user can record a new expense and see the treasury balance decrease afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the amount field with a valid expense amount
Verify the treasury balance is updated

title: Create or update a store successfully
description: Verifies that an admin can add or edit a store and save the store details.

steps.description: Create a new store or open an existing store for editing
Verify the store appears in the stores list
Verify the saved store details are reflected

title: Complete a purchase invoice and update supplier balances
description: Verifies that completing a purchase invoice refreshes the supplier balance and updates the last purchase price for the purchased products.

steps.description: Add a product to the invoice
Fill in a valid quantity and purchase price for the product
Verify the purchase invoice is completed
Verify the supplier balance is updated and the product last purchase price is refreshed

title: Create a purchase invoice and update stock cost
description: This test verifies that a user can create a purchase invoice and see inventory reflected with an updated last purchase price.
category: Purchase invoice creation and supplier balance/last purchase price update

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Navigate to the purchase invoices page
Add products and quantities to the invoice
Verify the purchase invoice is saved
Verify updated stock cost information is displayed

title: Update route configurations
description: Verifies that an admin can review route settings and save updated route configurations.

steps.description: Verify the updated route configuration is displayed

title: Create a customer with an opening balance
description: Verifies that a user can create a new customer and save an opening balance successfully.

steps.description: Verify the opening balance is shown for the customer

title: Transfer stock between stores
description: This test verifies that a user can transfer inventory from one store to another and see the quantities updated in both locations.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Choose a source store and a destination store
Select products and quantities for the transfer
Verify inventory quantities are updated in both stores

title: Create a customer payment with the linked invoice details
description: This verifies that a user can open the customer payment form and complete it with the required invoice linkage and amount.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open customer payments
Fill in the amount field with a valid payment amount
Verify the new customer payment appears in the list

title: Create a supplier with an opening balance
description: Verifies that a user can create a new supplier and save an opening balance successfully.

steps.description: Verify the opening balance is shown for the supplier

title: Rep creates a sales invoice with multiple items and saves it in progress
description: This verifies that a sales invoice can be started, populated with more than one product, and saved without completion.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add a product to the invoice
Add another product to the invoice
Save the invoice as in progress
Verify the invoice is saved as in progress
Verify multiple invoice items are retained

title: Create a supplier payment with the linked invoice details
description: This verifies that a user can open the supplier payment form and complete it with the required invoice linkage and amount.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open supplier payments
Fill in the amount field with a valid payment amount
Verify the new supplier payment appears in the list

title: Review a customer's statement and transactions
description: Verifies that opening an existing customer shows their account statement along with linked invoices and payments.

steps.description: Review the linked invoices and payments

Verify linked invoices and payments are displayed

title: Review low-stock items

title: Filter profit and loss results by date range
description: Verifies that a user can open the profit and loss report, choose a date range, and see results for that period.

steps.description: Set a valid start date in the date range
Set a valid end date in the date range
Verify profit and loss results are displayed for the selected period

steps.description: Set a valid start date in the date range

Verify account statements are displayed for the selected period

title: Review personal sales records
description: A rep can open the sales page and see their own sales records and totals.

steps.description: Verify personal sales records are displayed

title: Create a new check and see it listed with its status
description: This verifies that a user can create a check with direction and details and see the saved check in the checks list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the checks section

title: Review assigned inventory items
description: A rep can open the inventory page and see the stock items assigned to them with availability information.

steps.description: Verify assigned inventory items are displayed

title: Review route plan
description: A rep can open the route page and see the planned route days with assigned customers.

steps.description: Verify planned route days are displayed

title: User sees an invalid login message
description: This verifies that an incorrect username or password is rejected with visible feedback.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with invalid-user
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Verify an invalid login message is visible

title: Review assigned collections
description: A rep can open the collections page and see their assigned collection worklist.

steps.description: Verify the collections worklist is visible

title: Edit an existing expense
description: This verifies that a user can change an existing expense amount or category and save the updated record.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Change the expense amount or category
Verify the updated expense appears in the list

title: View account details and change password
description: Verifies that a user can review their profile information and save a new password from the profile page.

steps.description: Verify the profile page shows a successful password change confirmation
Verify the account details remain visible

title: Review today collections and route tasks together
description: A rep can move between the collections and route pages to review the daily follow-up work without losing access to either page.

steps.description: Click the link to open the route plan
Verify planned route days are displayed
Click the link to open collections

title: Update an existing check status
description: This verifies that a user can open an existing check, change its status to an allowed state, and save the update.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the checks section
Change the check status to another allowed state
Verify the updated check status is displayed

title: Switch between inventory and sales views
description: A rep can navigate from inventory to sales and back to confirm both personal pages are available during normal browser use.

steps.description: Click the link to open my sales
Verify personal sales records are displayed
Click the link to open my inventory
Verify assigned inventory items are displayed

title: Delete a customer with no linked transactions
description: Verifies that a customer with no linked transactions can be deleted successfully from the customer list or detail view.

steps.description: Verify the customer is removed from the customer list
Verify an empty or deleted state is shown for the customer

title: Rep is warned when completing a sales invoice with insufficient stock
description: This verifies that an invoice with quantity above available stock cannot be completed and shows a stock validation message.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add a product to the invoice
Enter a quantity greater than available stock for the product
Verify an insufficient stock message is visible

title: Prevent saving a payment without the required amount
description: This verifies that the payment form blocks submission when the required amount is missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open customer payments
Verify a payment validation error is visible

title: See empty personal sales history when none exists
description: A rep with no sales history sees an empty state instead of incorrect sales totals or records.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no personal sales records are displayed

title: See empty collections worklist when nothing is assigned
description: A rep with no assigned collection work items sees an empty state instead of stale or misleading data.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no assigned collections are displayed

title: See empty assigned inventory when none is available
description: A rep with no assigned inventory sees an empty state instead of unavailable items or stale stock counts.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no assigned inventory items are displayed

title: See empty route plan when nothing is scheduled
description: A rep with no route plan assigned sees an empty state instead of an incomplete schedule.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no planned route days are displayed

title: Block saving a check with incomplete required details
description: This verifies that the check form shows validation feedback when required details are omitted.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

Click the link to open the checks section
